title: Cabaret trágico
writer: Óscar J. Brooks, Emilio Carballido, Alfonso Corona Blake
actors: Columba Domínguez, Kitty de Hoyos, Carlos Baena
plot: Marcos and Nicasio become fugitives when they discover a body. They go into hiding at the Calypso cabaret where Marcos meets and falls in love with the main act Yolanda played by exuberant in sensuality Kitty de Hoyos. Is this lov...
